description: The Float3Driver component can be used to drive a foat3 value, based on an X, Y and a Z value.

fields.X: The field that holds the X value for the float3. If null, the X component of the float3 will be 0.
fields.Y: The field that holds the Y value for the float3. If null, the Y component of the float3 will be 0.
fields.Z: The field that holds the Z value for the float3. If null, the Z component of the float3 will be 0.
fields.Target: The field that is driven to the constructed float3.
